name: cognigy-mcp-server
description: Connect your AI assistant to Cognigy.AI — create, test, and improve LLM-based AI Agents through a self-improvement loop.
long_description:
A Model Context Protocol server that exposes the Cognigy.AI API through 9 high-level workflow tools focused on LLM-based AI Agents.

Create a complete AI Agent setup in one tool call (Agent + Flow + Job Node + Endpoint), then talk to it, evaluate responses, and iterate until it's perfect.

Supports: AI Agent management, knowledge stores, conversation history, flow management, analytics, and direct agent testing via REST endpoints.

cognigy_api_key.title: Cognigy API Key
cognigy_api_key.description: Your Cognigy API key (Cognigy.AI → User Menu → My Profile → API Keys)

tools.name: manage_ai_agents
tools.description: Create, read, update, delete, list, or hire AI agents

tools.name: manage_knowledge
tools.description: Manage knowledge stores, sources, and search knowledge chunks

tools.name: manage_conversations
tools.description: List conversations, get details, or retrieve session state

tools.name: manage_flows
tools.description: Create, update, list flows and manage flow nodes

tools.name: manage_intents
tools.description: Create, update, list intents and train NLU models

tools.name: get_analytics
tools.description: Get analytics data, logs, and audit events

tools.name: manage_projects
tools.description: Create and list projects, create and list endpoints

tools.name: manage_extensions
tools.description: List extensions and manage custom functions

tools.name: talk_to_agent
tools.description: Send a message to a Cognigy AI Agent and get the response
